cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1927 · 民族 唯一
cover.subtitle:
비타협 민족과 사회주의,
손을 맞잡은 4년.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration. Dark blue-gray, crimson accent, sepia. ONE Korean man in white dopo robe (representing nationalist) shaking hands with ONE Korean man in dark Western suit and round glasses (representing socialist), profile view facing each other against a misty Seoul cityscape with low-rise tile-roofed buildings. A faint banner shape behind them (no text). Color: dark blue-gray + ink-black, accent of crimson. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 신간회 창립, 회장 이상재. 자매 근우회 결성.

items.name: 이상재
items.desc: 전국 120여 지회를 묶은 항일 거점 구축.

items.name: 이광수
items.desc: 타협 자치론 주장, 신간회 결성 명분 됨.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 신간회 결성 배경(자치론·6·10 만세·민족유일당), 3대 강령, 광주학생항일운동 지원, 해소(1931) 시기 구분이 단골 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to two clasping hands silhouettes suggesting solidarity. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
